infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TTPortal uses the camera so you can take photos of venues and table conditions to share in your reviews and check-ins.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TTPortal accesses your photo library so you can attach existing photos to venue reviews and check-ins.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TTPortal uses your location to show table tennis venues near you, suggest the closest places to play, and help you check in where you are.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TTPortal uses your location to show table tennis venues near you, suggest the closest places to play, and help you check in where you are.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: TTPortal uses your location to show table tennis venues near you and help you check in where you are.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TTPortal needs microphone access only if you record a video to attach to a venue review. Photo-only uploads do not use the microphone.
